codeReview.summary: Implementation matches the feature description and expected behavior: all three theme blocks define the required 14 variables, earth uses bone-ivory --fg, shadcn bridge variables are mapped to design tokens in each block, and hardcoded scrollbar/inline-code color usages were made theme-aware.

sharedStateObservations.observation: gui-worker procedure requires running TUI tests in addition to UI tests and typecheck, but this worker handoff reports only UI tests and typecheck while still marking followedProcedure=true.
sharedStateObservations.evidence: .factory/skills/gui-worker/SKILL.md step 6 lists `pnpm exec vitest run packages/orchestrator-tui/ --max-workers=3`; handoff verification.commandsRun for session 7ff290f6-a8f6-40eb-ade5-fc3bae146a47 includes `pnpm exec vitest run ui/src/ --max-workers=3` and `pnpm -r typecheck` only.

summary: Pass. The commit cleanly implements theme-variable blocks and token bridging for papierklammer/violet-indigo/earth in ui/src/index.css with matching automated coverage; no blocking code defects found in scope.
